one_time_description: Gain on investment in South Beach Group of Partnerships (modified equity method)
economic_notes: First Nation operates multiple economic enterprises including pharmacy, grocery store, fuel sales, entertainment centre, and holds a one-seventh interest in South Beach Casino and related partnerships. Legal claims initiated against other parties with proceeds not yet received.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2022 — not 2024. Province is Manitoba. 12 entities fully consolidated plus one government business partnership (South Beach Group of Partnerships) accounted for by modified equity method. Large deferred revenue increase ($8.25M deferred to subsequent year vs $2.65M prior year) distorts operating results. Gain on South Beach investment of $1.43M is a significant non-cash item. Economic Enterprises segment includes multiple band-owned businesses. COVID-19 segment reported separately. No remuneration schedule visible in provided text. Annual debt service reflects repayments only; new advances of $503,932 for CMHC Phase 14 construction loan.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
